news.summary: In Miami, The Hackett Group, Inc. announced findings from their 2025 Key Issues Study. They discovered that global business services (GBS) organizations are significantly increasing their use of artificial intelligence (AI). According to the study, in 2024, 42% of GBS organizations tested Gen AI, with 63% of these early adopters experiencing improvements in productivity, cost savings, and service quality. This indicates a positive trend towards AI adoption in the business sector.
news.headline: The Hackett Group study shows 63% of GBS organizations reaping early benefits from AI adoption.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, mPulse®, a top provider of Health Experience and Insights (HXI) technology, commends the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) for granting a limited waiver of upcoming changes to the Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA) rules regarding consent revocation. This decision offers a 12-month extension, giving healthcare organizations the opportunity to establish effective systems and procedures to comply with the new federal regulation, affecting numerous individuals across the country.
news.headline: mPulse applauds FCC for granting 12-month delay in TCPA rules, allowing healthcare industry time to adapt.

news.summary: In St. Louis, Perficient has contributed donations to 10 charitable organizations through its Perficient Gives Global Grants Program. Alongside this initiative, the company has released its 2024 Community Impact Report, highlighting its philanthropic efforts and community involvement.
news.headline: Perficient donates to 10 charities under global grants program, releases 2024 Community Impact Report.

news.summary: A top GNSS data services provider, Rx Networks, has launched TruePoint | FOCUS, a cloud-based GNSS correction service offering centimeter-level accuracy instantly. This service caters to applications needing real-time precision and supports RTK (OSR) and PPP-RTK (SSR) modes for optimal flexibility and performance. With TruePoint | FOCUS, users can access high-precision GNSS data easily for various applications.
news.headline: Rx Networks introduces TruePoint | FOCUS, a cloud-based GNSS correction service providing centimeter-level accuracy instantly.

news.summary: UKG, a prominent firm offering HR, payroll, and workforce management solutions, has been acknowledged as a Leader in the Nucleus Research SMB HCM Technology Value Matrix for the fifth consecutive year. The report for 2025 focuses on the comprehensive UKG Ready® suite, which now includes UKG Bryte™, UKG Ready Great Place To Work® Hub, and UKG One View™ multi-country payroll options. This recognition underscores UKG's continued success and commitment to innovation in the industry.
news.headline: UKG named SMB HCM leader 5th year in a row. Offers UKG Ready suite with UKG Bryte, Great Place To Work Hub, and UKG One View.

news.summary: A recent partnership announcement reveals that Tonic.ai has teamed up with AWS in San Francisco. The collaboration aims to provide AWS customers with privacy-compliant synthetic data for AI and software development. This strategic partnership is expected to offer valuable solutions to AWS clients, with Tonic.ai bringing its expertise in synthetic data to the table. Through this collaboration, AWS customers can leverage the benefits of privacy-compliant data for their AI projects and software development needs.
news.headline: Tonic.ai teams up with AWS to provide privacy-compliant synthetic data for AI and software development, benefiting AWS customers.

news.summary: In the third quarter, Tilray Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: TLRY) experienced a decrease in net revenue from $188.3 million to $185.8 million, falling short of the expected $210.45 million. However, when adjusted for currency fluctuations, net revenue saw an increase to approximately $193 million. This quarter's revenue was impacted by $13.2 million due to strategic initiatives and SKU rationalization, as well as the absence of $6 million from discontinued products in the prior year. Despite these challenges, the company reported a breakeven in adjusted EPS ($0.00), surpassing the anticipated 4 cent loss. Gross profit rose by 5% to $52.0 million compared to $49.4 million in the previous year, with a gross margin boost of 200 basis points to 28%. Adjusted EBITDA stood at $9.0 million, down from $10.2 million in the same period last year. These significant financial figures demonstrate Tilray Brands’ performance highlights in the latest quarter, with more details available.
news.headline: Tilray Brands Q3 net revenue down to $185.8 million, below consensus of $210.45 million. Gross profit increased to $52.0 million.

news.summary: In ZIONSVILLE, Indiana, a partnership was revealed between Gainbridge® and Hall of Fame soccer legend Briana Scurry. The agreement spans multiple years, with Scurry appointed as a brand ambassador for the Group 1001 company. Scurry, a two-time Olympic gold medalist and World Cup Champion, will collaborate with Gainbridge® on initiatives aimed at advancing opportunities for female and youth soccer athletes. Additionally, Scurry will lead nationwide clinics and empower women to reach their financial aspirations. The alliance aims to inspire and support women and youth in soccer, leveraging Scurry's acclaimed status in the sports world.
news.headline: Gainbridge® partners with Briana Scurry, US Soccer Legend, as brand ambassador to empower women and youth soccer players.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, IRALOGIX, a groundbreaking fintech company in the retirement sector, introduced the IRALOGIX Retirement Readiness Index (IRRI) to assess Americans' readiness for retirement. The IRRI evaluates retirement preparedness in five key areas and the Q1 2025 assessment revealed important insights. The national Retirement Readiness Index indicated that many Americans may not be adequately prepared for retirement, signaling a need for improved financial planning and security. This new benchmark aims to provide a comprehensive overview of retirement readiness nationwide.
news.headline: IRALOGIX debuts Retirement Readiness Index, Americans score 45.8 in Q1 2025, indicating gaps in financial preparedness.

The partnership signals a pivotal move for Demand Chain AI as it seeks to capitalize on the booming pet food industry. This strategic initiative is expected to leverage the expertise of both companies and drive growth in their respective markets. This development marks a significant step forward in the evolution of Demand Chain AI’s capabilities in sales and operations, positioning the company for further success.
news.headline: Instinct Pet Food partners with Demand Chain AI to upgrade S&OP capabilities, further boosting sales.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 8, 2025, an inventor from Miami, Florida, expressed the need for clean and safe public restrooms for truck drivers. He highlighted the prevalent issue of dirty and unsanitary toilets that drivers often encounter. The inventor was inspired to address this problem and proposed a solution to ensure a consistently clean and hygienic toilet seat.
news.headline: Inventor from Miami develops retractable toilet seat for public restrooms to ensure cleanliness and safety.

Morgan Asset Management has surpassed its fundraising goal for timberland management strategy, reaching a total of $2.3 billion, which includes additional commitments to the strategy. news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Helcim, a payment company catering to small and medium businesses, introduced Faster Deposits, a new feature enabling merchants to access their funds within one business day with no extra charges. This initiative aims to support businesses by providing quicker access to their funds hassle-free.
news.headline: Helcim launches Faster Deposits for small businesses, providing access to funds by the next business day at no extra cost.

news.summary: In Appleton, Wisconsin, on April 8, 2025, WOW Logistics, a renowned company offering temperature-controlled warehousing and supply chain solutions, revealed the selection of Steve Gundlach as the new Chief Executive Officer. news.headline: WOW Logistics names Steve Gundlach as new CEO, replacing Howard Kamerer after his retirement.

news.headline: Augmentir launches Augie™ Industrial AI Agent Studio for manufacturing, facilitating no-code creation of Agents to enhance operations.

news.summary: In Oxford, England on April 8, 2025, Care Fertility, a prominent fertility treatment provider, and U-Ploid Biotechnologies, an innovative reproductive health biotech company, have revealed a new research partnership to enhance egg quality and advance fertility treatment. This collaboration seeks to leverage their expertise in the field to potentially make significant strides in improving the outcomes of fertility treatments. The partnership is poised to combine the strengths of both organizations in this critical area, merging Care Fertility's extensive experience in fertility treatments with U-Ploid Biotechnologies' cutting-edge technologies. This initiative holds the potential to benefit a substantial number of individuals seeking fertility solutions.
news.headline: Care Fertility and U-Ploid Biotechnologies collaborate to enhance egg quality in women of advanced maternal age.

news.summary: In Miami on April 8, 2025, Nicklaus Children's and the School District of Palm Beach County introduced Project ADAM training in Palm Beach County public schools. The initiative aims to equip employees with the necessary skills to handle sudden cardiac arrests (SCA). Currently, employees at 77 SDPBC schools have completed the training.
news.headline: Nicklaus Children's and SDPBC partnered for Project ADAM training, with training conducted in 77 schools.

news.summary: In a collaborative effort, a new climate control system has been introduced in AUSTIN, Texas on April 8, 2025. This advanced system, developed by AIIR Products, incorporates energy-efficient technologies and is easier to install, offering increased design flexibility for developers, building owners, and architects. This system utilizes AI-powered features to provide cutting-edge heating and cooling solutions. This collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency and design capabilities of climate control systems, potentially benefiting a wide range of stakeholders.
news.headline: AIIR and Sass, Moore & Associates team up to bring AI-powered HVAC systems to Philadelphia, offering energy efficiency and design flexibility.

news.summary: A revolutionary hearing solution for those with mild to moderate hearing loss has been introduced by EssilorLuxottica in the United States. Named Nuance Audio Glasses, this innovative product seamlessly integrates into eyewear. Launched on April 8, 2025, by EssilorLuxottica, the Nuance Audio Glasses present a groundbreaking invisible open-ear hearing solution tailored for individuals with perceived mild to moderate hearing loss.
news.headline: EssilorLuxottica launches Nuance Audio Glasses in the U.S., an invisible open-ear hearing solution for mild to moderate hearing loss.

news.summary: In Lugano, Switzerland on April 8, 2025, it was reported that BE OPEN participated in the Regional Forum on Sustainable Development 2025 at the UN offices in Geneva on April 2-3. The forum focused on the theme "Advancing Sustainable, Inclusive, Science- and Evidence-based Solutions for the 2030 Agenda." The event aimed to discuss strategies and initiatives related to sustainability and inclusivity, with a particular focus on science and evidence-based approaches.

news.summary: Siemens Digital Industries Software has recently finalized the acquisition to enhance its offering in PCB design for the small and medium-sized business market. The acquisition allows for broader process coverage, spanning from design to manufacturing preparation. The transaction was concluded on April 8, 2025, in Plano, Texas. This strategic move will significantly benefit Siemens and reinforce its position in the market, making it well-equipped to cater to the needs of customers in the SMB segment.
news.headline: Siemens acquires DownStream Technologies to expand PCB design, manufacturing flow; enriching offerings for SMB market.

news.summary: A company based in Stockton, California, Applied Aerospace, revealed on April 8, 2025, that it has provided material support to the Blue Ghost Lunar Lander. Applied Aerospace specializes in manufacturing solutions for spacecraft, launch vehicles, aircraft, and ground systems. The advanced materials supplied by the company were utilized in various operational systems and on-board components of the Blue Ghost Lunar Lander. This showcases Applied Aerospace's expertise in the space industry and its commitment to supporting cutting-edge space exploration endeavors.
news.headline: Applied Aerospace supports NASA's Blue Ghost Moon Lander with advanced materials to repel lunar dust, boosting space exploration efforts.

news.summary: A new partnership has been formed to merge live sports and entertainment with advanced digital product design and technology, establishing a groundbreaking level of digital interaction. This venture aims to redefine the digital engagement landscape, providing audiences with unparalleled experiences.
news.headline: Trackhouse Racing and Very Good Ventures partner to enhance digital experiences in motorsports, combining live events with digital innovation.
